name: Japan Signature — Ultimate
title: Japan Signature — Ultimate
shortDescription: A comprehensive Japan journey combining history, culture, and natural beauty across multiple regions, featuring iconic landmarks, scenic railways, and overnight ferry travel.
highlights: Tokyo's iconic landmarks and Sensoji Temple

itinerary.title: Auckland — China Transit City
itinerary.description: Depart Auckland via transit through Beijing, Shanghai, or similar Chinese hub.

itinerary.title: China — Tokyo
itinerary.description: Arrive Tokyo. Meet and greet, hotel transfer.

itinerary.title: Tokyo Highlights
itinerary.description: Visit Tsukiji Outer Market, Sensoji Temple, Meiji Shrine, and Shinjuku Gyoen National Garden.

itinerary.title: Tokyo — Kamakura — Shizuoka
itinerary.description: Explore Kamakura's Great Buddha and Tsurugaoka Hachimangu Shrine, stroll Enoshima Island.

itinerary.title: Shizuoka — Oigawa Railway — Nagoya
itinerary.description: Experience the nostalgic Oigawa Railway and visit a green tea plantation.
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel JAL City Nagoya or similar

itinerary.title: Nagoya — Iga — Kyoto
itinerary.description: Visit the Iga Ninja Museum and Fushimi Inari Taisha Shrine.
itinerary.accommodation: Miyako Hotel Kyoto Hachijo or similar

itinerary.title: Kyoto Free Day
itinerary.description: Optional Kyoto Cultural Discovery tour including matcha experience and temples.
itinerary.accommodation: Miyako Hotel Kyoto Hachijo or similar

itinerary.title: Kyoto — Himeji Castle — Okayama
itinerary.description: Visit iconic Himeji Castle. Enjoy Shinkansen ride.

itinerary.title: Okayama — Miyajima — Hiroshima
itinerary.description: Tour Miyajima Island and Itsukushima Shrine, then Hiroshima Peace Memorial Park and Atomic Bomb Dome.

itinerary.title: Hiroshima — Kintaikyo Bridge — Fukuoka
itinerary.description: Visit Kintaikyo Bridge and Sanzoku Restaurant en route to Fukuoka.
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel JAL City Hakata or similar

itinerary.title: Fukuoka — Overnight Ferry
itinerary.description: Visit Dazaifu Tenmangu Shrine and Canal City Hakata. Evening overnight ferry departure.
itinerary.accommodation: Meimon Taiyo Ferry (Second Class DLX Twin Room)

itinerary.title: Osaka
itinerary.description: Visit Osaka Castle Park, Shinsaibashi, and Dotonbori.

itinerary.title: Osaka Free Day
itinerary.description: Optional Kyoto Seaside Excursion including Amanohashidate and thatched village.

itinerary.title: Osaka — Nara — Gifu
itinerary.description: Visit Nara Park to see the friendly deer, then proceed to Gifu.

itinerary.title: Gifu — Narai-juku & Tsumago-juku — Nagano
itinerary.description: Stroll through the Edo-period post towns of Narai-juku and Tsumago-juku.
itinerary.accommodation: Ikenotaira Onsen Hotel, Nagano or similar

itinerary.title: Nagano — Mt. Fuji — Yokohama
itinerary.description: Visit Mt. Fuji 5th Station and enjoy lake cruise on Lake Kawaguchi.

itinerary.title: Yokohama — Return
itinerary.description: Transfer to Tokyo Narita or Haneda Airport for return flight.

itinerary.title: Arrive in New Zealand
itinerary.description: Arrive Auckland. Tour ends.

inclusions: Transportation by tour coach and second-class train
Entrance fees and meals as specified in the itinerary
exclusions: Transportation and guide services during free time
Meals not listed in the itinerary
Tips (suggested NZD $15 per day per person)

name: Japan Discovery — Highlights
title: Japan Discovery — Highlights
shortDescription: Experience Japan blending timeless beauty with modern marvels. Journey includes ancient temples, bustling markets, Mt. Fuji, snow monkeys, UNESCO villages, and historic castles from Tokyo to Osaka.
highlights: Mt. Fuji with Lake Ashi cruise and Hakone Ropeway
Snow monkeys bathing in hot springs (Jigokudani)
Traditional Japanese tea ceremony in Kyoto

itinerary.title: Auckland — Shanghai/Beijing — Tokyo
itinerary.description: Depart Auckland, transit in Shanghai.

itinerary.title: Tokyo
itinerary.description: Arrive Tokyo, free time depending on flight schedule.
itinerary.accommodation: Shinagawa Prince Hotel Tokyo or similar

itinerary.title: Tokyo Highlights
itinerary.description: Visit Meiji Shrine, Outer Gardens of Imperial Palace, Tsukiji Market, Sensoji Temple, and Akihabara Electric Town.
itinerary.accommodation: Shinagawa Prince Hotel Tokyo or similar

itinerary.title: Deeper Tokyo
itinerary.description: Asakusa district, Sensoji Temple, Nakamise Shopping Street. Ascend Tokyo Skytree for panoramic views.
itinerary.accommodation: Shinagawa Prince Hotel Tokyo or similar

itinerary.title: Fuji Five Lake Region
itinerary.description: Lake Ashi boat cruise and Hakone Ropeway to Owakudani Valley.

itinerary.title: Mt. Fuji — Nagano
itinerary.description: Mt. Fuji 5th Station (weather permitting), Itchiku Kubota Art Museum, continue to Nagano.
itinerary.accommodation: Mercure Hotel Matsushiro Nagano or similar

itinerary.title: Nagano
itinerary.description: Jigokudani Monkey Park to observe wild macaques in hot springs. Zenkoji Temple.
itinerary.accommodation: Mercure Hotel Matsushiro Nagano or similar

itinerary.title: Nagano — Takayama
itinerary.description: Daio Wasabi Farm, Ishii Miso Brewery, Matsumoto Castle. Proceed to Takayama with hot spring experience.

itinerary.title: Takayama Cultural Tour
itinerary.description: Miyagawa Morning Market, Takayama Jinya, Yatai Kaikan (Festival Floats), Kusakabe Folk Museum.

itinerary.title: Shirakawa-go — Kanazawa
itinerary.description: UNESCO gassho-style village of Shirakawa-go. Traditional washi paper-making in Gokayama. Nomura Samurai House.

itinerary.title: Kanazawa — Kyoto
itinerary.description: Stroll through Kenrokuen Garden, then continue to Kyoto.
itinerary.accommodation: Miyako Hotel Kyoto Hachijo or similar

itinerary.title: Kyoto Cultural Immersion
itinerary.description: Kiyomizu-dera Temple, traditional tea ceremony, famous Fushimi Inari Shrine.
itinerary.accommodation: Miyako Hotel Kyoto Hachijo or similar

itinerary.title: Kyoto — Hiroshima
itinerary.description: Golden Pavilion (Kinkaku-ji) and Ryoan-ji Zen garden. Shinkansen bullet train to Hiroshima.

itinerary.title: Hiroshima — Miyajima
itinerary.description: Peace Memorial Park and Museum. Ferry to Miyajima Island and Itsukushima Shrine.

itinerary.title: Himeji Castle — Osaka
itinerary.description: Majestic Himeji Castle and Koko-en Garden. Continue to Osaka.
itinerary.accommodation: Holiday Inn Osaka Namba or similar

itinerary.title: Osaka — Nara — Osaka
itinerary.description: Day trip to Nara: Todai-ji Temple and Isuien Garden. Return to Osaka for Dotonbori and Osaka Castle.
itinerary.accommodation: Holiday Inn Osaka Namba or similar

itinerary.title: Osaka — Departure
itinerary.description: Depart from Osaka via Beijing or Shanghai.

itinerary.title: Arrive Auckland
itinerary.description: Arrive back in New Zealand.

inclusions: Transportation by tour coach and second-class train
Entrance fees and meals as specified in the itinerary
exclusions: Transportation and guide services during free time
Meals not listed in the itinerary
Tips (suggested NZD $15 per day per person)

name: Japan Discovery — Explorer
title: Japan Discovery — Explorer
shortDescription: An immersive Japan journey from Tokyo to Osaka, combining iconic sights like Mt. Fuji, Matsumoto Castle, and Shirakawa-go with cultural traditions including tea ceremonies and gold leaf crafting.
highlights: Mt. Fuji visit and Lake Ashi cruise
Gold leaf crafting experience in Kanazawa

itinerary.title: Auckland — Shanghai/Beijing — Tokyo
itinerary.description: Depart Auckland, transit through Shanghai or Beijing.

itinerary.title: Tokyo
itinerary.description: Arrive Tokyo, greeting and hotel transfer.
itinerary.accommodation: Sunshine City Prince Hotel or similar

itinerary.title: Discover Tokyo
itinerary.description: Tokyo Skytree, Sensoji Temple, Imperial Palace Outer Gardens, Hamarikyu Gardens. Evening dinner cruise on Tokyo Bay.
itinerary.accommodation: Sunshine City Prince Hotel or similar

itinerary.title: Mt. Fuji Adventure
itinerary.description: Shinkansen to Odawara. Lake Ashi cruise, Komagatake Ropeway, Mt. Fuji's 5th Station (weather permitting).

itinerary.title: Matsumoto Castle & Miso Culture
itinerary.description: Tour iconic Matsumoto Castle and visit local brewery for traditional miso-making.
itinerary.accommodation: Mercure Hotel Matsushiro Nagano or similar

itinerary.title: Takayama Heritage
itinerary.description: Miyagawa Morning Market, Edo-period homes, Festival Float Exhibition Hall, Kusakabe Folk Museum, Takayama Jinya.

itinerary.title: Shirakawa-go — Kanazawa
itinerary.description: UNESCO Shirakawa-go village with gassho-zukuri houses. Washi paper-making. Travel to Kanazawa and visit Kenrokuen Garden.

itinerary.title: Kanazawa — Kyoto
itinerary.description: Gold leaf crafting, Higashi Chaya district, historic Shima Teahouse. Travel to Kyoto.
itinerary.accommodation: Miyako Hotel Kyoto Hachijo or similar

itinerary.title: Kyoto Traditions
itinerary.description: Ryoan-ji Zen garden, Golden Pavilion (Kinkaku-ji). Participate in origami and traditional Japanese tea ceremony.
itinerary.accommodation: Miyako Hotel Kyoto Hachijo or similar

itinerary.title: Kyoto — Nara
itinerary.description: Fushimi Inari Taisha with thousands of red torii gates. Todai-ji Temple and deer in Nara Park. Isuien Garden.

itinerary.title: Nara — Osaka via Mount Koya
itinerary.description: Mount Koya: Okunoin Cemetery, Kongobu-ji Temple, Garan temple complex. Continue to Osaka.

itinerary.title: Discover Osaka
itinerary.description: Osaka Castle, Yodo River cruise, Dotonbori entertainment district. Free time for shopping.

itinerary.title: Osaka — Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer to airport for return flight to Auckland.

itinerary.title: Arrive Auckland
itinerary.description: Arrive back in New Zealand.

inclusions: Transportation by tour coach and second-class train
Entrance fees and meals as specified in the itinerary
exclusions: Transportation and guide services during free time
Meals not listed in the itinerary
Tips (suggested NZD $15 per day per person)
